description_long: This is a small wooden cabin constructed from light-colored horizontal logs, elevated on concrete footings. The front features a set of double doors with glass panes and a small set of steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by open wooden railings. The roof is a prominent hip style, covered in reddish-brown hexagonal shingles, providing a rustic yet sturdy appearance. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically placed on both visible side walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the cabin is solid wood with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and insulation. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for use as a garden house, park shelter, or small urban retreat.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a hip roof, double front doors, and large multi-pane side windows, elevated on concrete footings. The structure features light wood logs and a reddish-brown shingled roof, giving it a rustic yet urban-friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass-paneled doors, wooden steps, and open railings on either side.
description_view_1: Side view with a large multi-pane window and a glimpse of the open front doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another large multi-pane window and the open front doors visible at the edge.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with moderate overhangs, covered in reddish-brown hexagonal asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large, rectangular, multi-pane windows symmetrically placed on each side wall; no windows on the front or rear facades
attribute_door_placement: One set of double doors centered on the front facade, opening outward with glass panes
